cds.title: Bagaichama najau timi
cds.note: My favourite Nepali song.. It just melts my heart.

cds.title: Dont matter
cds.note: I remeber my big brother playing this song on repeat when I was little. In that process I fell in love with this song... But It don't matter right?

cds.title: Life Goes On
cds.note: For the ones who never gave up on me.

cds.title: Till I Collapse
cds.note: I literally listen this one on repeat when i have something important to do which requires courage. 2,3 goes and i'm fired up toe to head!

cds.title: Song Cry
cds.note: They say you can't turn a bad girl good But once a good girl's gone bad, she's gone forever I'll mourn forever Shit, I've got to live with the fact I did you wrong forever

cds.title: PRIDE.
cds.note: Pride gon be the death of me.

cds.title: Dive
cds.note: And let me know the truth before I dive right into you.

albums.title: Recovery
albums.note: Life can get pretty hard sometimes, Its unpredictable, But when that time comes when i get badly down. The Recovery album catches me and grabs me tight. Containing songs from thought provoking to soul burning. Its an absollutly amazing album. Eminem created a masterpiece while recovering from drug addiction to take responsibility as a father(Goated momentum). All of the 17 tracks of the album is like a roaring engine. Whereas that beautifully currated wordplays act as fuel to that engine. That drumm.....I'm gonna stop. Go check up that album ASAP! It's beautiful!!
The depper the vioce, The depper the meaning. my celebrity crush BTW.

albums.title: Illmatic
albums.note: He INFACT do know how to do that shit!!! Short and robust this album is the definition of perfecton.

albums.title: Me Against The World
albums.note: My introduction to poetry through wordplays. Can feel the authentic words of Tupac on this album FR!

albums.title: The Blueprint
albums.note: Literally a blueprint for modern hip-hop.

albums.title: The Eminem Show
albums.note: Eminem at his peak commercial and critical success.It's like watching Mona Lisa being painted.

albums.title: Lokgeet Haru
albums.note: Voice so addictive I genuinely think her voice can attract souls (Sinners type shit) try listining this objectively and you'll get what I mean. Timeless album for sure.

albums.title: Khoj
albums.note: Suggestted as a gift on my 20th birthday by my homie. This album proves Modern Nepali music can have depths too.

albums.title: My Beautiful Dark Twisted Fantasy
albums.note: The production on this album is insane. Every track feels like an anthem.

albums.title: DAMN.
albums.note: Kendrick is a true artist. This one right here is a masterpiece. Including varaiety of songs

albums.title: To Pimp A Butterfly
albums.note: A truly iconic album that addresses important social issues gracefully. And honestly taught me how much a dollar really costs.

albums.title: Good Kid, M.A.A.D City
albums.note: I'm Dying of Thirst. poetry in another level.

albums.title: Get Rich Or Die Tryin'
albums.note: The energy on this debut is unmatched.

albums.title: Life After Death
albums.note: Pure East Coast Classic. The king of East, Notorious B.I.G reflected a ruthless persona on this one. Buttersmooth rhymes on a shaky boom box beats. Smells like NYC. effortless flows and when the beats get cold with razorsharp rhymes, Notorious B.I.G proves why he is the king of the East.

albums.title: 2014 Forest Hills Drive
albums.note: Storytelling at its finest. It's like a musical biography.

albums.title: Music To Be Murdered By
albums.note: I remember the first time I heard this album. I was there when it was released.
A masterpiece of production.

albums.title: Born Sinner
albums.note: He doesn't let Nas down BTW!

albums.title: Divide
albums.note: Maybe we fell in love, right where we are.

albums.title: Know-It-All
albums.note: My introduction to Alessia Cara.

albums.title: No. 6 Collaborations Project
albums.note: Love the variety of artists on this project.(Eminem and 50) Really shows Ed's versatility.

albums.title: The Off-Season
albums.note: Pure lyricism. Cole is at the top of his game here.

albums.title: The Pains of Growing
albums.note: Untill you're ready for me!

albums.title: The Black Album
albums.note: Some of Jay's best work. You really can't knock the hustle!

albums.title: The Marshall Mathers LP
albums.note: Raw and unfiltered. Just like it was supposed to be

albums.title: X
albums.note: Kiss me under the light of a thousand stars!!!

A late-career masterpiece.

albums.note: Modern classic. Slick, dark, and incredibly cool.
